why_v1: Call controls risk when range edge is not strong enough to raise.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Calling fits because the compressed turn keeps your edge alive without leaving a clean reason to bloat the pot.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Call is better when the turn compresses both ranges enough that your edge can continue but not cleanly enough to force a bigger pot. The controlled line keeps weaker hands in and realizes equity without overplaying a narrowing advantage.
